channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-04-28)
channel.description: Resumen de las mejores ofertas y freebies del d?a 2026-04-28.

item.title: [HOT] Spitfire Audio|Spitfire Audio Spring Sale – up to 50% off on all libraries. Plus, an extra 10% off when you purchase 3 or more qualifying libraries.?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] HoRNet Plugins|HoRNet Plugins is offering HoRNet Graffio distortion/saturation plugin as a free download.?ENDSSOON!?NEW
[SAVE BIG] HoRNet Plugins|HoRNet Plugins is offering 89% off on HoRNet SAMP master bus plugin for Atmos mixing. Use the code: SAMP89.?NEW
[HOT] PSP Audioware|Get 66% off PSP auralComp by PSP Audioware. The discounted price is $99.?NEW
[SAVE BIG] Kirk Hunter Studios|Get 92% off Concert Strings Adaptive by Kirk Hunter Studios for $39.99 (Normally $499.00).?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 92% - Desarrollador: Kirk Hunter Studios - Finaliza: 2026-05-11
